message:
feat(alerts): add debug logging for empty request bodies

The acknowledge and dismiss alert endpoints now log debug messages when
requests arrive without a body, making it easier to trace why default
values are being applied.

Previously, when clients sent acknowledge/dismiss requests without
specifying who performed the action, the server would silently fall
back to default behavior. This made it difficult to debug scenarios
where acknowledgedBy or dismissedBy values were unexpectedly null.

Changes:
- Initialize logger at start of acknowledge handler
- Log alertId when acknowledge request has no body
- Initialize logger at start of dismiss handler
- Log alertId when dismiss request has no body

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
